Name: user_departments
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."user_departments" WHERE "public"."user_departments"."department_id" = ANY($1::uuid[]) ORDER BY (SELECT "_cs_ob0"."name" FROM "public"."departments" "_cs_ob0" WHERE "public"."user_departments"."department_id" = "_cs_ob0"."id" AND "_cs_ob0"."id" = ANY($2::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) ASC LIMIT 10) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."user_id" AS "user_id") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
